entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum, a drought-tolerant cereal productive in arid regions

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to produce yield under low water availability

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: LOW RAINFALL
entities.description: Rainfall levels as low as 200 to 250 mm

entities.name: ARID AND SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The driest rainfed regions where pearl millet is a reliable cereal

entities.name: CROP-LIVESTOCK PRODUCTION SYSTEMS
entities.description: Integrated agricultural systems combining crop cultivation and livestock rearing

entities.name: STOVER
entities.description: The stalks and leaves of the pearl millet plant used as animal fodder

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Animals that rely on crop stover for feeding

entities.name: FODDER VALUE
entities.description: The quality and nutritional worth of stover for livestock feed

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: Multidimensional programs targeting the whole plant for better yield and quality

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Region where a significant area of pearl millet is grown using hybrids

entities.name: HYBRIDS
entities.description: Cross-bred varieties of pearl millet used to improve productivity

entities.name: STOVER NUTRITIONAL QUALITY
entities.description: The nutritional content of the stover in pearl millet hybrids

entities.name: LIVESTOCK PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The output and health of livestock influenced by fodder quality

entities.name: HETEROSIS
entities.description: The effect of hybrid vigor in top-cross hybrids

entities.name: TOP-CROSS HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: A breeding method used to create hybrids to assess heterosis

entities.name: STOVER QUALITY
entities.description: Traits related to the nutritional and physical quality of the stover

entities.name: GENOTYPIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The variation in traits among different genotypes of a species

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of stover produced per unit area
